name: Creole Daube Glace
recipeInstructions:
1. Slices 20 Pimiento-stuffed green olives and arrange them in the bottom of a 6-cup mold.
2. Carefully sprinkle finely shredded roast beef over the olives.
3. In a large bowl, mix unflavored gelatin with half a cup of cold beef broth until dissolved.
4. Heat remaining beef broth to boiling; add it to the gelatin mixture and stir until well combined.
5. Add minced green onions, parsley, minced garlic, Worcestershire sauce, and Tabasco sauce; mix thoroughly.
6. Chill the mixture just until it reaches the consistency of beaten egg whites, then pour over the olives and meat in the mold.
7. Chill until firm, then unmold to serve.
